name: Ted and May — couple, Ted has Carer's Allowance for May
note: One carer addition (£48.15). Ted being paid Carer's Allowance for May also answers 'is anyone paid for caring for you or your partner' — true — which would block a severe-disability amount, though none applies here anyway.
checked: Arithmetic hand-worked against SPC Regs 2002 reg 6(8) (£48.15) and SPC Act 2002 s.2(8), 2026-07-12.
